name: Quiche Florentine
recipeIngredient: 10 oz frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust according to package directions for a 9-inch pie plate. Refrigerate leftover crust.
2. In a large bowl, combine all remaining ingredients and mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie crust.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
6. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
